title: Fig. 1 in A PCR-Based Method for Sex Determination of Cycas micronesica (Cycadaceae)
author: Fernandez, Michael Angelo P.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. (a) Mature Cycas micronesica growing in limestone forest in northern Guam. (b) Close-up of microstrobili (male). (c) Close-up of megastrobili (female).
